case_title: GATDULA, MARIA GEMMA D. VS MATAMOROS, DENISA JOSE

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MATAMOROS, DENISA JOSE
DEFT DECLARATION FILED. FOR CORRECTION OF ADDRESS: 1227 HAMPSHIRE ST. "# 8 ", NOT APT. " B " AND IT'S ALSO NOT APT " 31 ". MY TEL. #(415) 595-8082
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF MAR-30-2006, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GATDULA, MARIA GEMMA D. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MATAMOROS, DENISA JOSE $400.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $422.00, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES FOR PERSONAL INJURIES TO BE $1000; AND ATTRIBUTES 60% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO PLAINTIFF. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. PLAINTIFF IS NOT THE REGISTERED OWNER OF THE VEHICLE, SO THAT NO AWARD IS MADE FOR PROPERTY DAMAGE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
D.M.V. CERTIFICATE OF FACTS RE UNSATISFIED JUDGMENT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GATDULA, MARIA GEMMA D.
